title: • 1 Armor Piece (Cloaks, Shields, Helmets, or Full Armor Sets)
content:
• 1 Armor Piece (Cloaks, Shields, Helmets, or Full Armor Sets)
• 3 Artifacts (Magical objects, cursed books, legendary items from fiction)

📜 How Items Are Acquired:
✔ A few items are distributed randomly to students who have completed all work so far.
✔ Other items must be won through class skill checks or game mechanics.
✔ Some items are only available to certain archetypes (e.g., The Fallen Angel may unlock an artifact tied to rebellion).

📜 Example: Week 8 (Dystopian Literature)
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 345 (chunk 345/555)
